roadmap.books: Deep Learning for NLP by Palash Goyal
roadmap.outcome: Ability to mathematically explain how high-dimensional linguistic data is compressed into dense vectors.
roadmap.resources: MIT OpenCourseWare (Linear Algebra), Stanford CS224N Lecture Notes
roadmap.subtopics: Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), Principal Component Analysis (PCA), Word Embeddings (Word2Vec, GloVe)
roadmap.tasks: Study the mathematical derivation of SVD and its application in Latent Semantic Analysis. Read Chapters 1-3 of Goyal to understand the transition from count-based to prediction-based embeddings.
roadmap.topics: Advanced Linear Algebra & Vector Space Models

roadmap.books: Deep Learning for NLP by Palash Goyal
roadmap.outcome: Deep understanding of the optimization challenges in temporal data and how gated architectures solve them.
roadmap.resources: Matrix Calculus for Deep Learning (Paper), Karpathy's 'The Unreasonable Effectiveness of RNNs'
roadmap.subtopics: Backpropagation Through Time (BPTT), Vanishing/Exploding Gradients, RNNs, and LSTMs
roadmap.tasks: Derive the gradient flow for a Recurrent Neural Network. Read the chapters on Sequence Modeling in Goyal. Implement a basic LSTM cell from scratch using only NumPy.

roadmap.books: Deep Learning for NLP by Palash Goyal
roadmap.outcome: Mastery of the Transformer architecture's mathematical core and why it outperforms previous sequence models.
roadmap.resources: 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al.)
roadmap.subtopics: Softmax distribution, Cross-entropy loss, Self-Attention, Multi-head Attention
roadmap.tasks: Analyze the Scaled Dot-Product Attention formula. Study Goyal's section on Attention mechanisms. Calculate the complexity of self-attention versus standard convolution.

roadmap.books: Deep Learning for NLP by Palash Goyal
roadmap.outcome: Competency in deploying advanced NLP models and understanding the math behind their training stability.
roadmap.subtopics: Adam Optimizer, Layer Normalization, BERT, and GPT architectures
roadmap.tasks: Study the convergence properties of the Adam optimizer. Read the concluding chapters on state-of-the-art NLP in Goyal. Fine-tune a pre-trained Transformer on a custom dataset.

final_section.mistakes: Focusing solely on library APIs without understanding the underlying matrix calculus or probability distributions. Skipping the 'why' behind activation functions.
final_section.motivation: You are navigating the intersection of linguistics and advanced mathematics. By mastering these foundations, you aren't just using AI—you are understanding the logic that powers the future of human-machine interaction.
final_section.tips: Dedicate the first hour of your daily session to the mathematical proofs and the second hour to the implementation found in Goyal's book.
